verdict.line: Even by value: Robertson (97th-percentile shot, 24) is worth about what the picks add up to — TOR cashes the asset, PIT bets the player beats the slots; the faint edge is PIT's. Robertson's value is a bet on his next contract, not a signed one. Priced at what these players would fetch, the deal tilts PIT's way by ~0.6 WAR — the verdict above prices realized value instead, where our lens has the stronger track record.

explain.pickNote: On the picks, TOR comes out about 0.2 WAR ahead — roughly a 4th-round pick's worth.
caveats: Nicholas Robertson: just-signed extension — the rating window predates the new deal, so the read runs noisy.
